pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly uses this filename and it matches the official OpenRocket example.
setup_task.sh and verifier.py enforce this exact output path.
setup_task.sh and verifier.py enforce this exact report path.
verifier.py checks that at least 2 launch guides are present in the final ORK file.
verifier.py requires a mass component named 'altimeter' to weigh exactly 0.045 kg.
verifier.py allows a mass tolerance of +/- 0.002 kg.
verifier.py uses 75 as the passing score threshold.

privileged_info_summary: I have verified that the source data is a real file from the official OpenRocket examples repository (Dual parachute deployment.ork). The task correctly sets up the environment to require the addition of 2 launch guides and a 45g (0.045kg) altimeter, matching the setup and verifier scripts precisely. Output paths and a pass threshold of 75 points are accurately reflected in the task metadata.
